ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the exhibition is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exhibition */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the exhibition (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exhibition record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the exhibition record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the exhibition record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the exhibition record was last updated */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the exhibition */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the exhibition */,
  "spending" TEXT /* Actual spending on the exhibition */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Total number of visitors for the exhibition */,
  "promotion" TEXT /* Promotional activities for the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., MoMA, Gallery A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of visitors the location can accommodate */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility of the location (e.g., wheelchair accessible) */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level required for the location (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, administrator, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist who created the artwork */,
  "year_created" TEXT /* Year the artwork was created */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium of the artwork (e.g., oil on canvas, sculpture) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the artwork is currently stored or displayed */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the artwork (e.g., excellent, fair, poor) */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Provenance of the artwork, including its history and previous owners */,
  "value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the artwork */,
  "insurance" TEXT /* Insurance details of the artwork */,
  "last_inspection" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the artwork */,
  "next_inspection" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection of the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibition_artworks" (
  "exhibition_artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition-artwork relationship */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork */,
  "display_location" TEXT /* Location within the exhibition where the artwork is displayed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork was installed in the exhibition */,
  "deinstallation_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork was deinstalled from the exhibition */,
  "condition_report" TEXT /* Condition report of the artwork during installation and deinstallation */,
  "conservation_notes" TEXT /* Conservation notes or requirements for the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_artworks_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_artworks_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibition_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., date change, description change) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the change (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_changes_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibition_visitors" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit log entry */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition visited */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., guided tour, self-guided) */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor (for non-registered visitors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_visitors_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_visitors_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the visitor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the visitor */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., annual, student, family) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the visitor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the visitor */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date of the last visit to the museum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibition_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition being reviewed */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor who provided the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the visitor (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback provided by the visitor */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_reviews_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_reviews_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id")
)
